applicable_policies.title: XX证券授权管理办法

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Explicitly repealed. Article 14 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md states the 2022 version is repealed effective 2025-01-01. The 2022 doc itself states it is deprecated and the 2025 version should be used as the current standard.
